prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 98.1 kg; Height 183.6 cm; BMI 29.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 165mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 186mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 169mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 97.7kg; 9 months ago 97.3kg; 6 months ago 92.9kg; 3 months ago 95.2kg; current 98.1kg), Height (12 months ago 183.6cm; 9 months ago 183.6cm; 6 months ago 183.6cm; 3 months ago 183.6cm; current 183.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 29.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 36U/L; 9 months ago 37U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 37U/L; current 33U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 162mg/g; 9 months ago 257mg/g; 6 months ago 283mg/g; 3 months ago 207mg/g; current 280mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 33mg/dL; 3 months ago 34mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 143mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
